title: Fortis Hospital Kangra | NABH Super Speciality Care in Himachal
heading: Your health, our priority - now closer than ever in Kangra
description: Experienced and trusted, NABH-accredited healthcare in Kangra. 24/7 emergency, pharmacy, and specialist care from Himachal’s leading super speciality hospital.
